title: Better Crosshair -+-
description: A simple crosshair that makes pvp so much more fun!
body:
This simple texture pack add a small crosshair that i personaly use fulltime and has helped me play better! i use it in bedwars but its also fantastic for simple venilla gameplay

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
